prompt:
Is this migration safe to run on production? We use Postgres 14 and do rolling deploys.

```ruby
class AddStatusToOrders < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.2]
  def change
    add_column :orders, :status, :string, default: "pending", null: false
    add_index :orders, :status
  end
end
```
assertions: Identifies the add_index without algorithm: :concurrently as unsafe (blocks writes)
Notes that disable_ddl_transaction! is required alongside algorithm: :concurrently
Provides corrected migration code with algorithm: :concurrently
Addresses the add_column with non-null default (either confirming safe on PG 14 with notes, or explaining manual approach)
